feedback.archetypes.nervous_system.systemEffect: Sets prose to breath-aware pacing, somatic exercises, and regulation-first structure across all titles
feedback.archetypes.nervous_system.emotionalBenef: Your readers' nervous systems downregulate from the first paragraph. Content functions as a co-regulation tool — reducing cortisol, slowing heart rate, and giving permission to rest. Readers report feeling 'held' by the writing itself.
feedback.archetypes.identity_direction.systemEffe: Activates forward-moving prose, honest-audit exercises, and anti-comparison hook strategy
feedback.archetypes.identity_direction.emotionalB: Readers stop scrolling and start choosing. This transforms the paralysis of 'I don't know what I'm doing' into momentum. Each chapter rebuilds identity through small, brave decisions — counteracting the shame of feeling behind.
feedback.archetypes.emotional_healing.systemEffec: Enables tenderness-first language, witness-based exercises, and grief-literate content pacing
feedback.archetypes.emotional_healing.emotionalBe: Readers feel seen, not fixed. This meets grief and pain with presence — no toxic positivity, no timelines, no 'you should be over this.' It fills the role of the compassionate witness many readers never had.
feedback.archetypes.performance_focus.systemEffec: Engages action-first prose, protocol-based exercises, and noise-cutting hook strategy
feedback.archetypes.performance_focus.emotionalBe: Readers cut through information overload and take their first real action in weeks. This reduces decision fatigue, builds systems that run on structure instead of willpower, and restores the feeling of being in control.
feedback.archetypes.spiritual_awakening.systemEff: Activates contemplative prose layers, gap-awareness exercises, and meaning-seeking hook strategy
feedback.archetypes.spiritual_awakening.emotional: Readers discover that what they've been chasing has been inside them all along. This creates space for depth in a world of surfaces — meeting spiritual seekers where intellectualized self-help couldn't reach.
feedback.personas.burned_out_pro.systemEffect: Tunes titles around exhaustion hooks, 'Sunday dread' narratives, and recovery-without-quitting framing
feedback.personas.burned_out_pro.emotionalBenefit: Content reaches people in survival mode — no guilt, no 'just try harder.' Your brand becomes the first voice that says 'you're not lazy, you're depleted' and actually means it.
feedback.personas.gen_z_seeker.systemEffect: Optimizes for short-form hooks, TikTok-native language, anti-hustle tone, and scroll-stopping openings
feedback.personas.gen_z_seeker.emotionalBenefit: Your brand meets Gen Z in their native language — authenticity-first. You become the trusted voice in a sea of performative wellness, offering real tools without the cringe.
feedback.personas.gen_alpha.systemEffect: Activates manga-first format, visual storytelling, gamified exercises, and guardian-safe content filters
feedback.personas.gen_alpha.emotionalBenefit: You're building content for the first generation with emotional vocabulary from childhood. Visual formats give them tools their parents never had — age-appropriate and genuinely helpful.
feedback.personas.grief_carrier.systemEffect: Sets permission-giving language, soft CTAs, no toxic positivity, and witness-based exercise structure
feedback.personas.grief_carrier.emotionalBenefit: Your brand becomes a companion through the unnamed grief — the kind nobody prepared them for. No fixing, no timelines. Just presence and the radical permission to not be okay.
feedback.personas.anxious_achiever.systemEffect: Bridges high-performance framing with vulnerability backdoors, nervous system support, and imposter syndrome hooks
feedback.personas.anxious_achiever.emotionalBenef: You reach people who look fine outside and are crumbling inside. Your brand bridges achievement language with vulnerability — the backdoor to healing that achievers will actually walk through.
feedback.personas.spiritual_returner.systemEffect: Activates dense contemplative prose, tradition-aware references, anti-guru positioning, and depth-first hooks
feedback.personas.spiritual_returner.emotionalBen: Your brand speaks to people who've tried everything and are exhausted by shallow answers. Dense, authentic content that respects their intelligence and meets their depth.
feedback.personas.new_parent.systemEffect: Prioritizes micro-format delivery, guilt-free framing, quick-tool exercises, and naptime-length content
feedback.personas.new_parent.emotionalBenefit: Your brand reaches parents in the stolen moments — 3AM feeds, naptime scrolls. Micro-format tools with zero guilt help them reclaim identity without adding to their overwhelm.
feedback.moments.2am_overthinking.systemEffect: Opens with sensation-based language, validates the spiral, offers immediate grounding tool within first 30 seconds
feedback.moments.2am_overthinking.emotionalBenefi: Content catches them in the exact moment of vulnerability — lying awake, phone glowing, mind racing. The hook lands because it describes what they're physically feeling right now.
feedback.moments.after_breakup.systemEffect: Names the specific numbness flavor, avoids advice-giving, leads with somatic awareness of loss
feedback.moments.after_breakup.emotionalBenefit: You meet them in the numbness nobody talks about — not the crying kind, but the food-has-no-taste kind. Your brand names what they can't articulate, and that alone begins healing.
feedback.moments.burnout_cant_quit.systemEffect: Catches the mask-on moment, speaks to public/private gap, frames recovery as a skill not a luxury
feedback.moments.burnout_cant_quit.emotionalBenef: You speak to the moment between the bathroom mirror and the mask going back on. Content validates the gap between who they perform and who they are — permission to stop pretending.
feedback.moments.feeling_behind.systemEffect: Targets comparison-scrolling behavior, reframes 'behind' as construction, turns phone into trigger object
feedback.moments.feeling_behind.emotionalBenefit: You interrupt the comparison scroll with truth: they're not behind, they're building. The phone itself becomes the trigger object, transforming mindless scrolling into honest self-reflection.
feedback.moments.panic_spike.systemEffect: Physical-first language, names body sensations before emotions, immediate somatic intervention within 10 seconds
feedback.moments.panic_spike.emotionalBenefit: Content uses body-first language when the mind has left the building. During panic, the body needs to hear 'I see you' before the mind can process anything. This saves real people in real moments.
feedback.moments.sunday_dread.systemEffect: Taps weekly anxiety cycle, validates sinking feeling, reframes Sunday as reclamation rather than countdown
feedback.moments.sunday_dread.emotionalBenefit: You name the weekly dread that millions feel but never articulate. Your brand reclaims Sunday from anxiety — transforming the sinking feeling into a ritual of preparation and self-compassion.
feedback.visualStyles.calm_minimal.systemEffect: Generates covers with vast white space, soft ink wash, zen aesthetic, muted palettes
feedback.visualStyles.calm_minimal.emotionalBenef: Readers experience visual relief — white space signals 'you can breathe here.' Covers feel like a meditation before the book is even opened. Reduces visual anxiety for overstimulated audiences.
feedback.visualStyles.dark_intense.systemEffect: Generates covers with deep indigo/black, dramatic lighting, cinematic grain, high contrast
feedback.visualStyles.dark_intense.emotionalBenef: Readers feel the gravity of their own transformation. Dark aesthetics signal depth — this isn't gentle wellness, it's real work. Attracts readers who distrust soft-looking self-help.
feedback.visualStyles.earthy_organic.systemEffect: Generates covers with handmade textures, botanical elements, warm amber tones, artisan aesthetic
feedback.visualStyles.earthy_organic.emotionalBen: Readers feel grounded before they read a word. Natural textures trigger biophilic calm — the brain interprets organic visuals as 'safe.' Powerful for somatic and nature-based healing.
feedback.visualStyles.bold_modern.systemEffect: Generates covers with stark contrast, oversized typography, red geometric accents, Swiss design grid
feedback.visualStyles.bold_modern.emotionalBenefi: Readers feel energized and decisive. Bold visuals cut through shelf noise and scroll fatigue. Signals 'this is different' — attracting action-oriented readers tired of pastel wellness.
feedback.visualStyles.premium_soft.systemEffect: Generates covers with geometric structure, precise typography hierarchy, gold accent lines, disciplined luxury palettes
feedback.visualStyles.premium_soft.emotionalBenef: Readers feel they are holding something authoritative and intentional. Geometric premium signals craft and clarity — attracting buyers who want transformation with editorial credibility.
feedback.visualStyles.sacred_cosmic.systemEffect: Generates mysterious atmospheric covers — deep blues and violets, subtle light, contemplative depth without horror
feedback.visualStyles.sacred_cosmic.emotionalBene: Readers feel curiosity and inward expansion. Mysterious visuals invite depth seekers without fantasy overload — magnetic on shelf and thumbnail.
feedback.formats.manga.systemEffect: Catalog planner prioritizes illustrated panels, short-form audiobooks (15-30 min), visual storytelling across all channels
feedback.formats.manga.emotionalBenefit: Visual-first readers process emotions through images faster than text. Manga reduces reading anxiety, engages Gen Z/Alpha natively, and makes complex psychological concepts accessible through story.
feedback.formats.book.systemEffect: Catalog planner prioritizes full-length narratives, deep programs, comprehensive workbooks, long-form audiobooks (3-8 hrs)
feedback.formats.book.emotionalBenefit: Deep readers crave immersion — long-form gives them permission to slow down and go deep. Full-length books become companions, building sustained attention that drives lasting transformation.

identity_direction.keywords: what am I doing with my life
